name: Keto Seed Bread

ingredients.item: • 12 cup water that has been brought

method: Preheat the oven to 180 degrees Celsius/350 degrees
Grease a loaf tin and line the bottom with a piece of
In a mixing bowl, whisk together the coconut flour, psyllium
husk powder, baking powder, salt, flaxseed flour, sunflower
seeds, pumpkin seeds, and chia seeds. (Reserve a couple of
teaspoons of pumpkin and sunflower seeds for the bread's
Crack the eggs into the mixture and thoroughly mix them.
Stir in the oil until it is thoroughly mixed and somewhat
Add the apple cider vinegar to the mixture and whisk well.
The dough may bubble up and change color due to the
vinegar's chemical reaction, but don't be afraid!
Slowly drizzle in the water until you get a dough-like texture.
Transfer the mixture to the loaf pan and spread it out evenly.
Top the loaf mixture with the saved teaspoons of seeds.
